rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation annexes in valid implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope or explicitly imported names
Do not modify the AADL model structure during fusion
generic_rules: Maintain the original component hierarchy and connections
Preserve all existing subcomponents and their connections
Do not introduce new component types or implementations during fusion
Ensure all inserted annex blocks are syntactically valid AGREE
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for AGREE contract blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes
Place implementation bindings in implementation scopes
Use only valid identifiers from the current scope
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes
Do not place implementation bindings in component type scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not modify the AADL model structure during fusion
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax for assume, guarantee, assign, and fusion
